global_context.scene_description: A cinematic editorial close-up of a single smartphone laying flat on a dark walnut surface. The phone screen fills 70% of the frame as the hero element. The screen shows an iOS-style booking app interface for an HVAC service. At the very top of the screen, a prominent solid yellow horizontal banner with bold black text reads '1.5x SURGE PRICING ACTIVE'. Below that banner, a smaller subtitle in dark grey: 'Phoenix demand is high right now.' Below the banner, the main content shows: 'EMERGENCY HVAC INSTALL' as a service heading in bold black. Below the service name: 'Standard rate: $9,500' with a clear strikethrough line crossing the price. Below the strikethrough: 'Surge rate: $14,500' in bold red, much larger. A 'BOOK NOW' button at the bottom in a bright app-style color. The entire phone screen is clean, modern, instantly readable, mimicking the Uber surge UI pattern that everyone recognizes. Single soft theatrical top-light catches the phone's edges, deep shadow falloff to near-black. Mood: that surge moment everyone knows from Uber, applied to HVAC. NOT a documentary photo, NOT cartoon, editorial product still life with theatrical lighting.

composition.framing: smartphone fills 70% of frame, slight 3/4 angle so screen is dominantly visible
composition.focal_point: the bright yellow SURGE PRICING banner across the top of the phone screen
